docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY ON REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOVAR, GLORIA HEARING SET FOR FEB-18-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 501

REMOVED FROM UD JURY CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-18-2014 - NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT DORA GOMEZ IS PRESENT. CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: RICHARD A. KRAMER, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT GOMEZ, DORA
NOTICE OF LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION, U.D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT GOMEZ, DORA LEE, MICHELLE F. ASSIGNED TO REPRESENT PARTY FOR U. D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. PLAINTIFF LEFT THE BUILDING WITHOUT BEING EXCUSED BY THE JPT. THIS CASE DID NOT SETTLE. THE TRIAL DATE OF FEB-18-2014 REMAINS ON CALENDAR. (501/JPT)

calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-18-2014 Dismissal - No Appearance

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Amanda Ebey; Clerk M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff in pro per Gloria Tovar is present.
Defendant Dora Gomez is present.
Attorney Michelle Lee appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions. Plaintiff left the building without being excused by the JPT. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of FEB-18-2014 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
